_comment: Shared Claude Code settings for PCILeechFWGenerator. User-local overrides go in settings.local.json (gitignored).

hooks.command: path=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); echo "$path" | grep -qE '(^|/)src/_version\.py$|(^|/)lib/voltcyclone-fpga/' && { echo "Blocked: $path is either autogenerated by setuptools-scm (src/_version.py) or inside the voltcyclone-fpga git submodule (lib/voltcyclone-fpga/). Hand edits will be overwritten or land in the wrong repository. Make the change upstream or via the build system." >&2; exit 2; } || exit 0
path=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$path" in *.py) command -v ruff >/dev/null 2>&1 && ruff check --fix --quiet "$path" 2>&1 | head -40 || true ;; esac
